headline: ₹100-500 Cr (long-term capex exposure, not immediate risk) — Adani Power's 2,500 MW RE RTC deal with MSEDCL boosts renewable portfolio, signaling sectoral transition.
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, CDP, GRI, TCFD, EU Taxonomy frameworks; no new deadlines or penalties.
No P/E compression or margin erosion expected; future revenue stability possible.
Potential for lower cost of capital via green financing, but no immediate bond spread impact.
